name: Chex® School Fuel
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons margarine or butter (do not use spread or tub products)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover a cookie sheet with waxed paper.
2. In a large microwavable bowl, microwave brown sugar, margarine, and corn syrup uncovered on High for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring after 1 minute until the margarine is melted.
3. Stir in baking soda until dissolved.
4. Stir in cereals (corn chex® cereal and rice chex® cereal).
5. Microwave on High for 3 minutes, stirring every minute.
6. Spread mixture on the cookie sheet. Cool for 10 minutes; break into bite-size pieces.
7. In a small microwavable bowl, microwave chocolate chips on High for 1 minute 30 seconds or until smooth (the bowl will be hot).
8. Drizzle chocolate over the snack.
9. Refrigerate for 30 minutes or until the chocolate is set.
10. Store in an airtight container.
8 cups snack.
Important: Because microwaves cook differently, times are approximate. For pretzel or peanut lovers: Stir in 1 cup broken pretzels or 1/2 cup honey-roasted peanuts with the cereal.
®Reg. T.M. of Chex Inc.
